name: Nature's Prophet
description: I woke within the seed and saw my destiny, and many were its branches.

abilities.name: Spirit of the Forest
abilities.description: The Prophet's Treants are considered as valid trees. Additionally grants the same bonuses to the summoned Treants.

abilities.name: Sprout
abilities.description: Deals damage within the radius upon cast.

abilities.name: Teleportation
abilities.description: The Prophet may globally teleport to any point on the map. Grants the Prophet an all damage barrier upon a successful teleportation.

abilities.name: Nature's Call
abilities.description: Verodicia bestowed the Prophet with the ability to summon the Treant Guard, a mythical sentient army of the wild. The Prophet can only summon as much sentient treants as there are trees in the area-targeted location.

abilities.name: Curse of the Oldgrowth
abilities.description: Unit is visible in fog, slowed and taking damage over time.

abilities.name: Wrath of Nature
abilities.description: A damaging energy that bounces around globally, striking enemy units close to the point-targeted location within the Prophet's vision radius. The damage increases incrementally per bounce. Applies a debuff that prohibits movement and attack on affected enemy units. The bind duration increases incrementally per affected enemy unit. Reduces cooldown.
